assignment.conditions: continuous target-specific amplitude pairs; no categorical H_A/H_B labels
assignment.implemented: six sequential np.random.default_rng(world_seed) uniform draws; one (a1,a2) pair per target
assignment.preregistration_discrepancy: PREREGISTRATION.md states a balanced Latin-square assignment, but exp1_prospective.py, causal_confirm.py, turnover_dev_runner.py and turnover_engine_03g.py all implement unblocked sequential continuous draws.

audit_gate.failure_reason: The implemented protocol has no assigned H_A/H_B conditions and no implemented Latin-square or blocked allocation. Any binary labels would be retrospective relabelling or target selection.
audit_gate.labels_recoverable_without_future_feedin: continuous a1,a2,dose,order yes; categorical H_A/H_B no because none exist

boundary_reference_audit.conclusion: No second qualified on-manifold, history-independent boundary construction is currently available.
boundary_reference_audit.matched_sham_only: own-trajectory replay is an exact manipulation sham but may carry the target history and is not a common history-independent isolation reference
boundary_reference_audit.qualified_prior_mechanical_reference: two-cell replay of the same-seed no-history trajectory; outcome-independent and on-manifold

causal_estimands.reason: assignment gate failed before intervention implementation or execution

first_stage.interpretation: These descriptive values cannot repair the missing randomization. They also do not show a stable protocol-predicted binary first stage.
first_stage.protocol_native_continuous_coordinate: own cumulative dose is primary; order is secondary and was not expected to survive long washout

global_channel_audit.ordinary_dynamic_up_ref: invalid for local-sufficiency identification if it carries assigned history

technically_defensible_variants.physical_validity: on-manifold if replayed from the matched no-history world
requires a frozen source/time rule and continuity qualification
engine-valid and previously viable, but a mechanistic ablation rather than ordinary coupling

hypothesis_H_RELATIVE.available_dev_observations: ambient memory and null-reference reversal motivate the hypothesis, while continuous history coordinates remain recoverable; neither fact establishes relative storage
hypothesis_H_RELATIVE.distinctive_randomized_history_predictio: not testable without an assigned H_A/H_B first stage

mediation.reason: no valid randomized-history effect exists to mediate

outcome_blind_access_rule: the audit accesses only seed, eligibility/feasibility, deep step, histories, centroids, sizes, passive material retention and pre-probe memory diagnostics; no beh/rest_beh/own field is accessed or used

preprobe_confound_audit.comparison: post-history S0 versus same-seed same-time no-drive; no feeding probe
preprobe_confound_audit.conclusion: The nutrient history is not memory-only: before the proposed intervention it changes body/geometry and at least one of rho/U/V/c/N in the compared targets.

spatial_balance_audit.allocation: unblocked sequential draws assigned to target indices sorted by size
spatial_balance_audit.conclusion: No design-based spatial balance guarantee exists. Approximate realized balance cannot substitute for the preregistered but unimplemented Latin square.

within_world_extremes.rule: A=max dose, B=min dose, omit middle target

preprobe_confound.comparison: post-history S0 minus same-seed same-time no-drive counterfactual
